rules.inactive_rule: Local character images that are not on the live website roster are inactive and must not be generated.
rules.placeholder_rule: Active members using img/600.png are active placeholders only while no identity details exist. If user-provided identity details exist, keep source=user_description and generation is allowed.
rules.avatar_text_rule: Avatar images must contain no readable text: no names, handles, roles, cap labels, clothing labels, signs, readable numbers, or written 600B marks.
rules.symbol_rule: Use wordless symbols instead: orange disks, abstract stacked glyphs, medallions, stones, orbs, costumes, silhouettes, objects, and posture.
rules.number_rule: The sacred number may appear in non-avatar scenes only, stacked as 600/000/000/000.
rules.style_rule: Avatar style target: cypherpunk, traditional/old-world craft, fantasy, cute manga/toon.
rules.full_body_rule: Generate adult full-body, head-to-toe, riggable humanoid characters unless explicitly making 2D mascot art.

active_members.name: dni
active_members.image_details: Dark hooded mystic/operator, glowing orange source disk behind head, raised hands, palm lights, chest light, warm ritual-tech atmosphere. User-specified canon: Bitcoin Jesus with Birkenstock-style sandals.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult humanoid Bitcoin Jesus / signal bearer in dark robe or long coat, centered and calm, hands open, small round stone or orb near chest or feet, wordless orange halo behind head, Birkenstock-style sandals without visible brand marks, cypherpunk traditional fantasy cute manga/toon style.

active_members.name: nind
active_members.image_details: Abstract cyan/black architectural dome or grid viewed from below, tunnel depth, human presence implied. User-specified canon: Indian, sells roses, big in cakes, OG Pepe/frog meme fan.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult Indian architect/operator in clean dark utility clothing, framed by cyan dome geometry, bridge grid, or blueprint-light structure, carrying wordless roses, cake-box or pastry-tool props, and a small wordless green frog charm, cypherpunk traditional fantasy cute manga/toon style.
